summary: Iteration 26: Tested the redesigned 'Aspetto' (Appearance) tab in the CMS admin page (/gestione-sito). All features working correctly: 10 pre-configured theme presets, 4 color pickers (primary/accent/background/text), 2 font selectors (display/body), and live preview panel that updates in real-time. Theme changes are saved to database and applied to public site (/sito) via CSS variables.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning from dev tools, not affecting functionality
Some WhatsApp images returning 404 - not related to Aspetto tab, likely missing uploaded files

critical_code_review_comments: Aspetto tab implementation is complete and well-structured
All 10 theme presets have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Live preview panel updates in real-time when colors/fonts change
Color pickers use both native color input and text input for flexibility
Font selectors use standard HTML select elements with FONT_OPTIONS array
Theme changes are persisted via PUT /api/website/config endpoint
Public site correctly reads theme from config and applies via CSS variables
Minor: Console hydration warning about <span> in <select> - cosmetic issue from React dev tools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the redesigned Aspetto tab in /gestione-sito. The tab includes: 10 theme presets (Elegante Scuro, Rosa Classico, Blu Moderno, Oro & Nero, Verde Natura, Viola Lusso, Corallo, Minimal Bianco, Teal Fresco, Borgogna), 4 color pickers (primary, accent, background, text), 2 font selectors (display, body), and a live preview panel. All features work correctly. Theme changes are saved and applied to the public site /sito via CSS variables.
